workspace_home.select_workspace_desc: Choose a workspace from the selector above, or create a new one.
workspace_home.decisions_empty: No pending decisions. At Supervised trust, decisions appear when agents need guidance, specs need approval, or gates fail.

repo_mode.no_active_agents: No active agents in this repo.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.close_panel: Close panel / return to workspace home

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.description: Create your first project to get started.

about.description: Gyre is an autonomous software development platform. Agents collaborate to write, review, and deploy code — all coordinated through the Gyre server.

briefing.title: Briefing
briefing.error_cached: Could not load live briefing: {error}. Showing cached data.
briefing.error_full: Unable to load briefing data: {error}. Check your connection.
briefing.mrs_merged: {count} MR{count, plural, one {} other {s}} merged. All gates passed.

decisions.title: Decisions
decisions.reconciliation_note: Auto-reconciliation coming soon — view both specs above to resolve manually.

spec_dashboard.title: Specs
spec_dashboard.no_specs_filter: No specs match the current filters.

code_tab.no_branches_empty: No branches found for this repository.
code_tab.no_commits_empty: No commits found for this branch.
code_tab.no_mrs_empty: No open merge requests for this repository.
code_tab.no_queue_empty: No entries in the merge queue for this repository.

user_profile.title: My Profile
user_profile.no_activity_desc: No judgment events recorded. Spec approvals, gate overrides, trust changes, and meta-spec edits will appear here.
user_profile.prefs_desc: Choose which notification types you receive in your Inbox.

meta_specs.title: Meta-Specs
meta_specs.subtitle: Your primary encoding mechanism — personas, principles, standards, and process norms.
meta_specs.select_or_create_desc: Choose from the list on the left, or create a new one.

repo_redirect.select_workspace: Select a workspace to edit meta-specs.

workspace.subtitle: Preview how persona and principle changes affect your workspace specs.
workspace.textarea_placeholder: Enter prompt content for this meta-spec…
workspace.no_specs_available: No specs available in this workspace.
workspace.sim_banner: Preview unavailable — showing example layout only.

create.title: New Meta-spec
create.subtitle: Define how agents think, behave, and communicate across your platform.
create.kind_persona_desc: Who the agent is — identity, tone, expertise
create.kind_principle_desc: What to prioritize — values and trade-offs
create.kind_standard_desc: How to write code — conventions and patterns
create.kind_process_desc: How to work — workflows and ceremonies
create.content_placeholder: Write the system prompt that will be injected into every agent bound to this meta-spec. Be specific about behaviors, constraints, and tone.
create.required_label: Required — org-wide mandatory (all agents must load this)

impact.no_workspaces_bind: No workspaces currently bind this meta-spec.
impact.view_in_architecture_desc: Click a repo to see governed nodes highlighted with predicted changes.
impact.view_repo_arch_aria: View {repoId} in Architecture tab with meta-spec overlays
impact.drift_text_suffix: Workspace-level drift tracking (repos built under older versions) is available after the spec-bindings API is extended.

history.no_history_desc: Save content changes to create new versions.

approval.approved_by: Approved by {user} — active in all bound workspaces.
approval.pending_text: Awaiting review. Approve to make active, or reject to block.
approval.rejected_text: Rejected — content changes will reset to Pending for re-review.

discard_modal.title: Unsaved Changes
discard_modal.message: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?

delete_modal.title: Delete Meta-spec
delete_modal.confirm_prefix: Are you sure you want to delete
delete_modal.confirm_suffix: This cannot be undone. If active bindings exist, deletion will fail with 409.

toast.saved_version: Saved — content change bumped to v{version}
toast.approved: Approved — now active in all bound workspaces
toast.marked_required: Marked as required — all agents must load this
toast.preview_unavailable: Preview not available from server — showing example layout

editor_split.llm_placeholder: Describe a change… e.g. 'Add error handling section'
editor_split.llm_hint: Ctrl+Enter · Produces draft suggestions — accept to apply

moldable_view.no_nodes_matching_desc: Try a shorter term or check spelling.
moldable_view.no_graph_data_desc: Push code to trigger graph extraction.
moldable_view.no_traces: No traces recorded — run integration gate tests to capture data.
moldable_view.select_repo_hint: Select a repository to view architectural history.
moldable_view.no_changes_desc_repo: Push code to trigger graph extraction and populate the timeline.
moldable_view.no_changes_desc_no_repo: Select a repository above to view its architectural timeline.
moldable_view.no_nodes_at_point: No nodes modified up to this point in history.

explorer_view.workspace_desc: Select a workspace repository to explore its knowledge graph
explorer_view.system_subtitle: Realized architecture — navigate the living knowledge graph
explorer_view.no_repos_desc: Create a repository in this workspace to explore its architecture.
explorer_view.select_repo_desc: Choose a repository above to explore its realized architecture — types, traits, functions, endpoints, and their relationships.
explorer_view.no_repos_hint: No repositories found. Create a project and repository to get started.

detail_panel.title: Detail panel
Title
detail_panel.llm_placeholder: Describe a change… e.g. 'Add error handling section'
detail_panel.llm_hint: Ctrl+Enter · Produces draft suggestions — accept to apply
detail_panel.preview_aria: Open editor split view with architecture preview
detail_panel.no_tasks: No tasks linked to this spec.
detail_panel.start_conversation: Start a conversation by typing below.
detail_panel.no_history_desc: Modification history will appear when changes are recorded.
detail_panel.nodes_governed: {count} {count, plural, one {node} other {nodes}} governed by this spec
detail_panel.diff_not_available_desc: Diff view requires a merge request context.
detail_panel.no_gates_desc: Gate checks will appear here when a merge request is active.
detail_panel.no_attestation_desc: Merge attestation and conversation provenance will appear after the MR is merged.
detail_panel.no_trace_desc: System trace timeline will appear when agent activity is recorded.
detail_panel.ask_why_hint: Spawns an interrogation agent to answer questions about this entity's decision history.
detail_panel.ask_why_unavailable: Conversation unavailable — no conversation SHA recorded for this entity.
detail_panel.interrogation_no_context: Cannot start interrogation: entity is missing repo/task context.
detail_panel.spec_not_loaded_desc: Spec content for {path} is not available in this context.

explorer_canvas.no_graph_desc: Select a repository to view its knowledge graph. Graph nodes are extracted on push.
explorer_canvas.graph_too_large: Graph too large ({count} {count, plural, one {node} other {nodes}}) — showing list view. Drill into a module to view its graph.
explorer_canvas.showing_public_only: Showing public API only — {count} private nodes hidden.
explorer_canvas.no_spec_hint: This node has no spec_path set. Create a spec to document and govern its behavior.
explorer_canvas.spec_unavailable: Spec content unavailable. Ensure the server has repo context.
explorer_canvas.risk_hint: Node size ∝ fan-in · Color = risk score
explorer_canvas.node_list_label: Node list (graph too large for canvas)
explorer_canvas.canvas_label: Architecture graph canvas — pan with drag, zoom with scroll, right-click for options, double-click to drill in

cross_workspace.title: All Workspaces
cross_workspace.subtitle: Tenant-scope overview — decisions, workspaces, specs, briefing, and agent rules across your organization.
cross_workspace.decisions_empty: No decisions needed — system is running autonomously.
cross_workspace.briefing_empty: No briefing data available across workspaces.

general.title: General
general.repo_name_hint: Repository names cannot be changed after creation.
general.max_concurrent_agents_hint: Maximum number of agents allowed to work on this repo simultaneously.

gates.title: Gates
gates.description: Gate chain configuration — the checks agents must pass before merging.
gates.empty: No gates configured for this repository.

policies.title: Policies
policies.description: Spec enforcement and merge policies for this repository.
policies.empty: No spec policy configured for this repository.
policies.require_spec_ref_hint: MRs must reference a spec before merging.
policies.require_approval_hint: Specs must be approved before agents can implement them.
policies.stale_warning_hint: Warn when a spec has not been updated in 30+ days.

budget.title: Workspace Budget
budget.description: Budget is managed at the workspace level. This view shows the workspace budget that governs all repos within it.
budget.unavailable: Budget data unavailable — this feature may not be configured.
budget.empty: No budget data available. Budget is managed at the workspace level.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.empty: No audit events found for this repository.

danger_zone.title: Danger Zone
danger_zone.archive_desc: Archiving stops all active agents and prevents new agent spawns. The repository remains readable but no further development work can proceed. You can unarchive at any time.
danger_zone.archive_confirm: This will archive {name}. Agents will be stopped and new agents cannot be spawned.
danger_zone.delete_desc: Permanently deletes this repository and all associated data including specs, agents, merge requests, and history.
danger_zone.delete_prereq: Archive this repository first before deleting it.
danger_zone.delete_confirm_prompt: To confirm deletion, type the repository name:
danger_zone.delete_confirm_aria: Type repository name to confirm deletion

general.title: General
general.rename_hint: Contact your administrator to rename the workspace.

trust.title: Trust & Policies
trust.trust_level_desc: Controls how autonomously agents operate in this workspace.
trust.supervised_desc: I review everything before it merges
trust.guided_desc: Agents merge if gates pass, alert me on failures
trust.abac_empty: No ABAC policies configured for this workspace.
trust.drift_desc: Controls how the workspace responds when agents produce code under outdated meta-spec versions.
trust.warn_on_drift_hint: Show a warning when code is produced under an older meta-spec version.
trust.block_on_drift_hint: Block merges when the code was produced under an older meta-spec version.
trust.drift_tolerance_hint: Allow agents to be this many versions behind before triggering warn/block.

teams.title: Teams
teams.empty: No members found in this workspace.

budget.title: Budget
budget.empty: No budget data available for this workspace.

compute.title: Compute Targets
compute.desc: Compute targets available for agents in this workspace, configured by your tenant.
compute.empty: No compute targets configured. Contact your tenant administrator.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.empty: No audit events found for this workspace.

tenant_settings.title: Tenant Administration
tenant_settings.subtitle: System-wide configuration — users, compute, budget, audit, health, and background jobs.

users.title: Users
users.desc: Tenant member and role management. Users are provisioned via OIDC — invite by adding them to your identity provider.
users.provisioning_note: User provisioning is managed via your OIDC identity provider. Add users through your IdP to grant access. Roles: Admin (full access), Member (workspace access), Viewer (read-only).

compute.title: Compute Targets
compute.desc: Available compute targets for running agents. Shared across all workspaces in this tenant.

budget.title: Budget
budget.desc: Tenant-level budget overview across all workspaces.

audit.title: Audit
audit.desc: Tenant activity log — admin actions, policy evaluations, and system events.

health.title: Health
health.subtitle: Current status of all system components.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.subtitle: Scheduled and on-demand background job status. Admins can manually trigger jobs.

common.token_desc: Set the Bearer token for all API and WebSocket requests.

inline_chat.hint_agent: Ctrl+Enter to send · Messages are signed and persisted via message bus
inline_chat.hint_qa: Ctrl+Enter to send · Read-only Q&A — cannot trigger actions
inline_chat.hint_edit: Ctrl+Enter to send · Produces draft suggestions — you accept before saving

workspace_cards.title: Workspaces
workspace_cards.subtitle: Choose a workspace to view its agents, specs, and architecture
workspace_cards.empty_desc: Create a workspace in Admin to get started.
